payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new input refers to Sara, which appears to be the same person as the existing Sara, but the relationship conflicts with the existing memory.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new relationship conflicts with an existing relationship.

repair_options: Replace the existing relationship with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing relationship: Sara is my daughter.
Record that Sara is both your daughter and niece if that is intentionally true.
Clarify whether these refer to two different people named Sara.
